---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for ClickFlow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Before opening: please check docs/ROADMAP.md and
  docs/KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md. Some categories are intentionally
  out of scope and will be closed:
    - real input emulation (mouse / keyboard at OS level)
    - captcha / antibot bypass
    - ad-click automation
    - automation against banking, payment, or protected apps
    - mobile build (research only)
  If your request relates to real input, OCR, or image recognition,
  please use the Safety report template instead so we can scope a
  safety review before any code is written.
-->

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current ClickFlow
behavior insufficient?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the feature.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem.

## UI / UX sketch (optional)

Describe or attach a sketch. Note: ClickFlow keeps the main screen
deliberately simple; new functionality usually belongs in the
**Advanced** dashboard.

## Localization

- [ ] I am willing to provide RU and EN strings for any new UI text.

## Safety impact

- [ ] This feature does **not** introduce real input, OCR, image
      recognition, network calls outside localhost, or any restricted
      automation.
- [ ] I have read the relevant sections of `CONTRIBUTING.md`.

If the feature does have a safety impact, please file a Safety
report instead.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior discussions, references.
